response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a senior full-stack software engineer but entirely lacks the hardware architecture and AI accelerator optimization background required for this role. There is no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, deep neural network workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design in their work history.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, including Staff and Senior roles.
Meets the baseline education requirement with a BS in Computer Science and over 8 years of experience.
Demonstrated ability to build high-performance micro-services handling millions of requests per second.
concerns: Zero experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks expertise in deep-learning workloads, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator optimization.
Experience is heavily skewed towards web development and full-stack engineering rather than hardware performance architecture.
